metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for writing and style analysis

plugins.name: stilwerk
plugins.description: Style analysis, authorship attribution, and text transformation. Combines quantitative stylometry with AI-assisted qualitative analysis.

plugins.name: fusion
plugins.description: AI agent orchestration framework with compliance guard, churn detection, and live monitoring. Provides 13 specialized agents (incl. consultant), a decision guard with escalation, and a real-time browser-based monitor.
